name: kicad
description: Local Claude Code plugin for reviewing PCB designs across EDAs (eda-review). Reads, understands, and REVIEWS KiCad 9/10 (.kicad_pro/.kicad_sch/.kicad_pcb via kicad-cli) and Altium Designer (.PcbDoc/.SchDoc via the eda-agent live bridge): ERC/DRC, deterministic engineering checks (IPC-2221 trace sizing, decoupling, net-class audit, schematic/board parity, DFM), distributor BOM sourcing (DigiKey + JLCPCB stock/validity), and JLCPCB manufacturability + stackup against authoritative data. Guarded, human-approved edits on the KiCad side (copper zones, design rules, stackup); routing/placement is advice-only on every backend. Forked from lamaalrajih/kicad-mcp (MIT).
